summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Panel implementation - all backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. Admin login, sidebar navigation, teachers management, and role-based access control all functioning correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: All 17 API endpoints working (100% success including new admin endpoints)
Admin Login: Authentication with test_admin@test.ru/test_admin successful, returns admin role
Admin Dashboard: Sidebar menu with Преподаватели, Задачи, Уроки, Документы all present and functional
Teachers Table: Shows Тестов Тест Тестович (test@test.ru) with status 'Зарегистрирован'
Add Teacher: Sheet/sidepage opens correctly with form fields
Teacher Creation: Successfully adds 'Новый Преподаватель Test' with email 'newtest@test.ru'
Teacher Display: New teacher appears in table after creation
Menu Navigation: All admin sections (Teachers, Tasks, Courses, Documents) load correctly
Admin Logout: Successfully logs out and redirects to login page
Regular User Login: test@test.ru/test still works and shows teacher dashboard (not admin)
Role-based Access: Regular users cannot access admin dashboard

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All API endpoints including admin functions working
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All admin panel features working correctly
